title: Hanuman Jayanti: Date, time & significance of Lord Hanuman Janmotsav in 2026
description: Hanuman Jayanti, a major Hindu festival, marks the birth anniversary of Lord Hanuman. Celebrated with great fervor, devotees offer prayers and seek blessings. This year, Hanuman Jayanti falls on April 2, 2026. The day is significant for honoring Lord Hanuman, believed to be an incarnation of Lord Shiva.
